name: Stats Bar
description: Horizontal bar of key statistics or metrics. Compact summary row.

default.description: Equal-width stat items in a row

slots.items: Equal-width stat cells with label, value, optional unit, and optional trend
Inline stat cells with divider separators and reduced padding
Stat cells with the first metric visually emphasized and remaining metrics secondary

visual_brief: Compact horizontal row of key statistics separated by subtle vertical dividers. Each stat shows a label in muted uppercase small text above a large bold value. The compact preset reduces vertical padding and font sizes. The highlighted preset adds a colored accent underline or background to the most important metric. Stats are evenly distributed across the bar width. Optional trend arrows (up/down) appear beside values with green/red coloring.

slots.items: Equal-width stat cells with label, value, optional unit, and optional trend

responsive.mobile: Stats wrap to a 2x2 grid or become horizontally scrollable. Values remain large. Labels may abbreviate.
responsive.tablet: Single horizontal row with all stats visible. Comfortable spacing.
responsive.desktop: Full horizontal bar with generous spacing between stats. All labels fully spelled out.

layout_hints.summary_priority: The value is the first read, then the label, then any trend. Keep that hierarchy stable across compact and highlighted variants.
layout_hints.bar_role: This pattern is a concise summary surface. It should feel like one horizontal instrumentation band, not a row of unrelated mini-cards.
layout_hints.highlighted_variant: When one metric is emphasized, it should still remain visually tied to the rest of the stats bar rather than breaking the row into separate modules.

motion.micro: Trend arrows or highlighted metrics may sharpen subtly on hover or focus.
motion.transitions: Value or trend updates should remain crisp and low-noise so the stats bar continues to feel stable.

keyboard: If stats are interactive, focus should move through them in the same left-to-right order as the visual bar.
announcements: Each stat's label, value, and trend should be exposed together so the summary remains understandable without divider lines or color cues.
